label: Algae Reduction Progress Faces Funding Cuts

comments.text: Once again, federal investments are paying off for NW Ohio. BGSU’s Shallow Run Watershed Project is showing progress to improve Lake Erie water quality. Led by Dr. Jay Martin, this partnership of farmers, researchers, and local leaders proves new practices can cut runoff and protect our Great Lakes!
